claims.subject: Cloudflare
claims.object: research program to make AI search smarter

claims.subject: Cloudflare
claims.object: Pay Per Use experiments with Ceramic.ai and You.com

claims.subject: Ceramic.ai
claims.object: pay-per-query model integrated with Cloudflare network

evidence.quote: Today we're launching a research program to make AI search smarter and stop our customers footing the bill for crawls that produce nothing new.

So we're starting to shape Pay Per Crawl into Pay Per Use. We're running experiments with top AI companies, like Ceramic.ai and You.com , and the arrangement is straightforward: organizations can bring their payment models and easily scale them to content owners across the Cloudflare network.
By bringing our pay-per-query model to their network, we ensure millions of content owners can seamlessly opt in to be compensated every single time their content appears in our search results.
